title: crotalaria pseudovirgultalis
intro: Crotalaria pseudovirgultalis is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae, commonly known as a legume or bean. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Traditionally, Crotalaria pseudovirgultalis has been used to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and promote wound healing due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or topical applications, and its health benefits include immune system support, antioxidant activity, and potential anti-cancer properties.
